title: Unable to Download Invoice
description: Download button for January invoice is unresponsive in the billing section.

title: Email Notifications Not Sending
description: Customer is not receiving order confirmation or password reset emails despite correct email address.

title: Login Issues - Can't Access Account
description: Customer is unable to log in after multiple password reset attempts. Receives 'Invalid credentials' error.

title: Profile Changes Not Saving
description: Customer updates profile information but changes revert after refreshing the page.

title: App Crash on Launch
description: Mobile application crashes immediately upon opening on Android 13 devices.

title: Slow Dashboard Loading
description: User dashboard takes more than 20 seconds to load after login.

title: Payment Failed - Card Declined
description: Payment attempt using Visa ending 1234 failed despite sufficient balance.

title: Dark Mode Not Applying
description: Customer enables dark mode but interface remains in light theme after refresh.

title: Two-Factor Authentication Issue
description: Customer is not receiving 2FA codes on their registered phone number.

title: Search Results Showing Irrelevant Data
description: Search feature returns unrelated products when filtering by category.

title: Unable to Update Profile Picture
description: Uploading new profile picture results in 'Upload failed' error.

title: Subscription Plan Not Upgraded
description: Customer upgraded to Pro plan but account still shows Basic tier features.

title: Refund Not Processed
description: Customer requested a refund two weeks ago but amount has not been credited.

title: File Upload Size Limit Confusion
description: User unable to upload files larger than 5MB but documentation mentions 10MB limit.

title: Missing Order Confirmation Email
description: Customer placed an order successfully but did not receive confirmation email.
